task_completion.description: The 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer is loaded into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer is visible in the Table of Contents (layer list) on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Belgium, Netherlands, and Luxembourg are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three countries are highlighted on the map canvas or their corresponding rows are selected in the attribute table.

task_completion.description: The selected countries are merged into a single feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A geoprocessing dialog for merging features is visible, or the map shows a single unified polygon covering the area of Belgium, Netherlands, and Luxembourg without internal borders.

task_completion.description: The 'NAME' attribute of the new merged feature is set to 'Benelux Region'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table is open and shows a row where the 'NAME' field contains the value 'Benelux Region'.

task_completion.description: The result is exported to a new shapefile named 'sales_regions.shp' at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, save prompt, or file manager shows the file being saved as 'sales_regions.shp' in the '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/' directory, or the new layer is loaded in the TOC with this name.

task_completion.description: The final layer contains exactly 175 features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table for the new 'sales_regions' layer shows a total record count of 175, or layer properties display a feature count of 175.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface to perform the merge and export operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GIS software's menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The attribute edit was performed within the GIS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attribute table shown belongs to the GIS application's interface, not a separate spreadsheet or text editor modifying the DBF file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use command-line tools (like ogr2ogr or python scripts) to bypass the manual GUI workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows are either not present or do not show commands executing spatial operations or file copying to generate the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer contains exactly 177 features. Merging Belgium, Netherlands, and Luxembourg (3 features) into a single 'Benelux Region' feature (1 feature) will mathematically result in exactly 175 features in the final 'sales_regions.shp' layer. The expected output path is /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/sales_regions.shp.
